channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Houthis claim attacks on Saudi tankers in Red Sea, raising risk of new chokepoint in Iran war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
- Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
- Yemen’s Houthis claim attacks on Red Sea tankers as US launches 12th night of strikes on Iran – Middle East crisis live
- Houthis claim attacks on 2 Saudi oil tankers in Red Sea
- Houthis say 2 Saudi oil tankers attacked in Red Sea
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers as Iran war expands to Red Sea
- Houthis say 2 Saudi oil tankers attacked in Red Sea
- Houthis strike tankers in Red Sea; first since Saudi-linked shipping blockade via Bab el-Mandeb
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers, threatening new chokepoint in Iran war
- Oil Jumps as Houthis Claim Strikes on Saudi Tankers in Red Sea
- Houthis say they attacked 2 Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea as US carries out 12th night of strikes
- Houthis claim strikes on Red Sea oil tankers as US continues attacks on Iran
- Houthis say they attacked 2 Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea as US carries out 12th night of strikes
- Two Saudi Oil Tankers Targeted as Houthi Blockade Disrupts Red Sea Shipping
- Houthis say they targeted two Saudi oil tankers in Red Sea
- Houthis claim attacks on two Saudi oil tankers as US continues strikes on Iran
- Houthis say they attacked two Saudi tankers; Saudi Arabia says one ablaze in Red Sea
- Iran-backed Houthis attack two Saudi Arabian oil tankers
- Houthis claim strikes on two Saudi tankers as US attacks on Iran widen
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers in the Red Sea, threatening new chokepoint in Iran war
- Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
- Iran-backed Houthis ‘strike two tankers’ in Red Sea
- Watch: Houthi spokesperson says group targeted Saudi oil tankers
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers in Red Sea, threatening new oil chokepoint in Iran war
- Houthis claim strikes on Red Sea oil tankers as US continues attacks on Iran
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers in the Red Sea, threatening new chokepoint in Iran war
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers in the Red Sea, threatening new chokepoint in Iran war
- Houthis Say Attacked 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
- Houthis strike two Saudi oil tankers
- Houthis claim Red Sea tanker strikes as US hits Iran again
- Houthis Now Attacking Saudi Oil Tankers In Red Sea, Major Energy Supply Implications
- Houthis attack Saudi tankers in Red Sea as US strikes Iran for 12th consecutive day
- Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
- Iran-backed Houthis attack two Saudi Arabian oil tankers
- Houthis say they attacked two Saudi tankers; Saudi Arabia says one ablaze in Red Sea
- Houthis claim strikes on Saudi oil tankers in Red Sea (VIDEO)
- Houthis Say They Attacked Two Saudi Tankers; Saudi Arabia Says One Ablaze in Red Sea
- Houthis say they attacked Saudi tankers in the Red Sea, threatening new chokepoint in Iran war]]>

item.title: Trump says Saudi nuclear pact requires normalization with Israel

Matched Titles:
- White House: Saudi nuclear deal ‘contingent’ on normalizing relations with Israel
- US-Saudi nuclear deal hinges on normalisation with Israel
- Trump throws newly signed Saudi nuclear deal into doubt with Israel recognition demand
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal depends on relations with Israel
- Trump Stuns Saudis By Pinning Nuclear Deal To Israel Ties
- How the Trump Administration’s Nuclear Deal With Saudi Arabia May Work
- Trump stuns Saudis by pinning nuclear deal to Israel ties
- Trump Says Saudi Arabia Nuclear Deal Contingent on Normalizing Ties With Israel
- Trump Ties Saudi Nuclear Deal to Normalization of Relations With Israel
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal depends on relations with Israel
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal 'totally subject' to Israel normalization
- Trump says nuclear deal depends on Saudis normalizing Israel relations
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal contingent on recognising Israel
- Trump backtracks on Saudi nuclear deal, demands Israel normalisation
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal contingent on recognising Israel
- U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Stokes Israeli Concerns of Mideast Arms Race]]>

- Trump says Saudi nuclear pact hinges on kingdom joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal hinges on kingdom joining Abraham Accords with Israel
- Trump says US-Saudi nuclear deal conditional on country joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says Saudi nuclear pact requires kingdom to normalize Israel relations through Abraham Accords
- Trump says US-Saudi 'civil' nuclear deal conditional on joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says US-Saudi nuclear deal subject to Riyadh joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says Saudi nuclear deal hinges on the kingdom joining Abraham Accords]]>

- EU to Freeze Russian Oil Price Cap for 1 Year – von der Leyen
- FACTBOX: Oil price cap freeze, bank restrictions in EU’s 21st sanctions package]]>
